mapper.sql: e.exchange_id, e.exchange_no, e.user_id, u.nickname, e.goods_id, g.goods_name, g.goods_type, g.cover_image, e.quantity, e.points_used, e.cash_amount, e.order_id, e.address_snapshot_json as address_snapshot, e.status, e.logistics_company, e.logistics_no, e.ship_time, e.complete_time, e.aftersale_status, e.create_time
mapper.select: select from jst_mall_exchange_order e left join jst_mall_goods g on g.goods_id = e.goods_id and g.del_flag = '0' left join jst_user u on u.user_id = e.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' where e.exchange_id = #{exchangeId} and e.del_flag = '0' limit 1
